{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozmanthus Arelius's parting message marble
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] has a marble that resembles a black hole in a glass bead which carries a parting message to his family.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
